title: IIM Udaipur Research Assistant/Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur)
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur) Research Assistant/Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIM Udaipur. Has been announced through the IIM Udaipur Research Assistant/Associate Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have an MBA or Master’s degree in a behavioural science-related area with proficiency in Excel and statistical packages are eligible to apply for these Research Assistant/Associate vacancies.

basic_details.job_title: IIM Udaipur Research Assistant/Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur) Research Assistant/Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIM Udaipur. Has been announced through the IIM Udaipur Research Assistant/Associate Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have an MBA or Master’s degree in a behavioural science-related area with proficiency in Excel and statistical packages are eligible to apply for these Research Assistant/Associate vacancies.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA or Master's degree in a behavioural science-related area
qualification.details: MBA or Master's degree in a behavioural science-related area. Proficiency in Excel and any statistical package is expected. The candidate must have high standards in terms of quality of work, attention to detail, ability to multi-task, and absolute commitment to timely task completion.

salary_details.pay_scale: Competitive salary, compensation and position will be aligned with qualification and experience, following IIMU norms for Research Assistants/Associates
salary_details.details: Competitive salary, compensation and position will be aligned with qualification and experience, following IIMU norms for Research Assistants/Associates.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Udaipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Udaipur Research Assistant/Associate positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Research Assistant/Associate positions at IIM Udaipur is 30 May 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBA or a Master's degree in a behavioural science-related area. Proficiency in Excel and any statistical package is also a key requirement for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Research Assistant/Associate positions at IIM Udaipur is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website or use the provided link to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the Research Assistant/Associate role?
faq.answer: As per the available information, there is no application fee mentioned for General/OBC categories. It is recommended to check the official notification for any specific details regarding application fees.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Research Assistant/Associate position?
faq.answer: The salary and compensation for the Research Assistant/Associate role will be competitive and aligned with the candidate's qualifications and experience, following the norms set by IIM Udaipur for such positions.

faq.question: Q6. What kind of skills are important for this role?
faq.answer: Besides the educational qualifications, candidates are expected to have high standards in terms of work quality, attention to detail, the ability to multitask, and a strong commitment to completing tasks on time.

faq.question: Q7. Where is IIM Udaipur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur) is located in Udaipur, Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Research Assistant/Associate position at IIM Udaipur is offered on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. Please ensure you review the notification thoroughly before applying.
